description: ČSN standards, Eurocode PDFs, and related ČSN-like binary references. Convention: PDF binaries live here for ČSN-like + university source PDFs; structured extracts (YAML/MD) live in B6_research_papers (university material) or B7_regulations (norms). Modern TKP PDFs live in docs/normy/tkp/ (canonical for free MD ČR docs). See docs/KNOWLEDGE_PLACEMENT_GUIDE.md §16.
